auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ScraperAPI API key passed as the api_key query parameter. Find it in your ScraperAPI dashboard API key page: https://dashboard.scraperapi.com/account.

actions.name: get_account_usage
actions.description: Retrieve current ScraperAPI account usage and limits.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving ScraperAPI account usage.

usage.description: Usage and account details returned by ScraperAPI.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving ScraperAPI account usage.

actions.name: scrape_url
actions.description: Fetch one public URL through ScraperAPI with optional rendering, geotargeting, and text output controls.

url.description: The public target URL ScraperAPI should request.

render.description: Whether ScraperAPI should render JavaScript before returning the response.

waitForSelector.description: The CSS selector ScraperAPI should wait for before returning the response. This requires render to be true.

countryCode.description: The two-letter country code used for request geolocation.

premium.description: Whether ScraperAPI should use premium residential or mobile proxies.

ultraPremium.description: Whether ScraperAPI should use advanced bypass mechanisms.

sessionNumber.description: The sticky session number used to reuse the same proxy across related requests.

keepHeaders.description: Whether ScraperAPI should forward provided custom headers to the target URL.

deviceType.description: The device type ScraperAPI should emulate.

outputFormat.description: The text-oriented output format ScraperAPI should return.

followRedirect.description: Whether ScraperAPI should follow target website redirects.

customHeaders.description: Custom HTTP headers ScraperAPI should forward to the target URL when keepHeaders is true.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for scraping one URL with ScraperAPI.

body.description: The response body returned by ScraperAPI.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by ScraperAPI.

anyOf.description: The response content type returned by ScraperAPI.

metadata.description: Metadata collected from the ScraperAPI response.

headers.description: Response headers returned by ScraperAPI or the target website.

outputSchema.description: The response returned by a ScraperAPI synchronous request.

actions.name: submit_url
actions.description: Send a POST or PUT request to one public URL through ScraperAPI.

url.description: The public target URL ScraperAPI should request.

render.description: Whether ScraperAPI should render JavaScript before returning the response.

waitForSelector.description: The CSS selector ScraperAPI should wait for before returning the response. This requires render to be true.

countryCode.description: The two-letter country code used for request geolocation.

premium.description: Whether ScraperAPI should use premium residential or mobile proxies.

ultraPremium.description: Whether ScraperAPI should use advanced bypass mechanisms.

sessionNumber.description: The sticky session number used to reuse the same proxy across related requests.

keepHeaders.description: Whether ScraperAPI should forward provided custom headers to the target URL.

deviceType.description: The device type ScraperAPI should emulate.

outputFormat.description: The text-oriented output format ScraperAPI should return.

followRedirect.description: Whether ScraperAPI should follow target website redirects.

customHeaders.description: Custom HTTP headers ScraperAPI should forward to the target URL when keepHeaders is true.

method.description: The HTTP method ScraperAPI should send to the target URL.

body.description: The request body to send to the target URL.

contentType.description: The Content-Type header for the submitted request body.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for submitting a request through ScraperAPI.

body.description: The response body returned by ScraperAPI.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by ScraperAPI.

anyOf.description: The response content type returned by ScraperAPI.

metadata.description: Metadata collected from the ScraperAPI response.

headers.description: Response headers returned by ScraperAPI or the target website.

outputSchema.description: The response returned by a ScraperAPI synchronous request.
